Class ScriptGenerationAgent

java.lang.Object
io.github.sentinel.ai.agents.ScriptGenerationAgent
public class ScriptGenerationAgent extends Object
AI agent that generates Cucumber feature files and Sentinel YAML page objects from a list of scenario outlines produced by the PlanningAgent. Both files are written to disk immediately upon generation.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    ScriptGenerationAgent.GeneratedFiles
    Holds the two files generated by generate(List, String, String, String, String).

  • Method Details

    • generate

      public static ScriptGenerationAgent.GeneratedFiles generate(List<String> scenarioOutlines, String pageName, String pageUrl, String featureNumber, String packagePath) throws IOException
      Generates and writes a .feature file and a YAML page object file to disk.
      Parameters:
      scenarioOutlines - list of scenario outlines from PlanningAgent
      pageName - page name used to name files (e.g. "LoginPage")
      pageUrl - default URL written into the YAML urls section
      featureNumber - numeric tag prefix (e.g. "500")
      packagePath - subdirectory under src/test/java/ for the YAML (e.g. "com/example/"), or null to use "pages/"
      Returns:
      the two generated files
      Throws:
      IOException

    • generateFeatureContent

      private static String generateFeatureContent(List<String> outlines, String pageName, String featureNumber)

    • generateYamlContent

      private static String generateYamlContent(List<String> outlines, String pageName, String pageUrl)

    • writeFile

      IOException
